zh-CN.name: 火龙果
zh-CN.intro: 火龙果是一种热带水果，穿着粉红色的外衣，上面有绿色的“小叶子”。果肉有白色的或红色的，吃起来甜甜软软的，里面还有像芝麻一样的黑色小种子。

story.title: 🐉小恐龙的火龙果
story.body: 小恐龙果果在森林里玩耍，突然发现地上有一个奇怪的东西。它长得粉粉的，身上有好多绿色的鳞片，还翘着一个小尾巴。果果好奇地碰了碰，自言自语：“这是龙蛋吗？”妈妈听到了，走过来说：“这是火龙果，是一种好吃的水果哦！”妈妈拿起刀，轻轻切开火龙果，里面露出了白色的果肉，还有无数小小的黑籽。果果尝了一口，甜甜的汁水在嘴里散开，软软的，滑滑的，还能咬到“咔嚓咔嚓”的小种子。果果开心地跳起来：“火龙果真好吃，原来它不是龙蛋，是甜蜜的水果呀！”果果把火龙果切成小块，和好朋友们一起分享，大家都吃得笑眯眯的。

knowledge.title: 火龙果长在哪里？
knowledge.body: 火龙果是仙人掌科植物的果实，喜欢温暖的地方。它的花朵像仙人掌花一样大，只在晚上开放。火龙果含有丰富的维生素和纤维，能帮助小朋友消化食物。

en.name: Dragon Fruit
en.intro: Dragon fruit is a tropical fruit with a pink peel and green scales. The flesh is white or red, sweet and soft, and full of tiny black seeds. It’s nutritious and delicious.

story.title: 🐉Little Dino's Dragon Fruit
story.body: Little Dino Guoguo was playing in the forest when he found a strange object. It was pink with many green scales and a little tail. Guoguo poked it curiously and said, 'Is this a dragon egg?' His mom heard him and said, 'This is a dragon fruit, a yummy fruit!' Mom cut it open, revealing white flesh and countless tiny black seeds. Guoguo took a bite—sweet juice filled his mouth, soft and smooth, with crunchy seeds. 'So delicious! It’s not a dragon egg, it’s sweet fruit!' Guoguo shared the fruit with his friends, and everyone ate happily.

knowledge.title: Where does dragon fruit grow?
knowledge.body: Dragon fruit comes from a cactus plant that likes warm places. Its big flowers bloom only at night. It is rich in vitamins and fiber, which helps children digest food.
